pr.title: [Val Only]: MLP 3x + STE int6 QAT + sliding window, val_bpb=0.9588

output.summary: Val-only 9-layer transformer widens MLP to 3x and trains with STE int6 QAT, mixed int6/int8 quantization, Muon tweaks, and sliding-window eval.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Training data is explicitly the validation shard for a val-only run.
techniques: STE fake-int6 QAT plus mixed post-training int6/int8 quant
Sliding-window eval with tuned Muon schedule
